title: DropAll
description: The mod allows you to instantly drop all items from the inventory at the touch of a button.
body:
This mod adds a convenient quick inventory reset feature—now you can dump all your items with a single click in your inventory. Perfect for cleaning up after mining, PvP, or simply when you need to quickly free up space. You can instantly get rid of unwanted items without any extra clicks. 

### Features:
- Quick reset of your entire inventory 
- Works client-side (no server installation required) 
- Minimal performance impact
